title: task
description: resources.py:509-511 - render_post() stores the same body dict reference in both _inbox (via deliver()) and _sent. Any mutation of either dict would corrupt both copies. Failure scenario: future code that adds status tracking to sent messages would inadvertently modify inbox messages. Fix: make a copy before storing in _sent.
close_reason: Fixed: Use copy.deepcopy(body) when storing to _sent to prevent shared dict reference with _inbox
